name: Kuwaiti Arabic
notes: Kuwaiti Arabic. Best-documented Gulf variety. k → /tʃ/ before front vowels: very salient and consistent. ق → /ɡ/ (traditional); /q/ in formal/MSA contexts. Heavy English influence (post-1950s oil era): /p/, /v/, /ŋ/ well-established from English loanwords. Holes (1990, 2001) primary reference.
